categories.name: Developer Tools
categories.description: Tools that improve how you write, review, and maintain code.

entries.name: Detail
entries.description: Scans your codebase to find serious bugs — exercises your code.

entries.name: Oanda Foreign Currency Converter
entries.description: Comprehensive resource for estimating currency exchange needs.

entries.name: EU Copernicus
entries.description: The Copernicus Climate Change Service (C3S) supports society by providing authoritative information about the past, present and future climate in Europe and the rest of the World.

entries.name: EEA Analysis and Datasets
entries.description: The European Environment Agency (EEA) is an agency of the European Union and provides valuable insights on the state of Europe's environment. Thanks to reliable data collected from our extensive network, we actively support Europe's environment and climate policies.
